extraction.one_line_summary: MCNULTY Brandon won from a three-rider break after HEALY Ben attacked with 35km to go but was caught on descent.
tactical_patterns: HEALY Ben attacking solo with 35km remaining reveals UAE's MCNULTY uses descent positioning to close gaps without burning matches.
RUBIO Einer at 11+ minutes allowed in break suggests teams underestimate GC threats beyond top-10 during transitional stages.
GC group limiting ARMIRAIL Bruno's loss to 30 seconds shows calculated tolerance preserving domestique leaders between mountain blocks.

rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: first grand tour stage win after five attempts shows breakthrough descending/finishing maturity at 25
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: repeated long-range attacks from breaks demonstrate repeatable winning pattern but finishing needs refinement
rider_signals.FRIGO Marco: positive: matched two stronger climbers until 3.6km remaining indicates improving stage race form
rider_signals.ARMIRAIL Bruno: neutral: holding pink by 1:08 after losing 30s suggests team accepted controlled losses before decisive mountains
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: UAE pacing GC group for podium position rather than pink shows strategic deference before week three
rider_signals.RUBIO Einer: neutral: most dangerous break rider at 11+ minutes yet not aggressively marked reveals GC teams' calculation threshold
